mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_human_review ( id, task_id, review_type, status, proposal_json, decision_json, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{reviewType}, #{status}, #{proposalJson}, #{decisionJson}, #{reviewedBy}, #{reviewedAt}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, review_type, status, proposal_json, decision_json, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, expires_at FROM agent_human_review WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, task_id, review_type, status, proposal_json, decision_json, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, expires_at FROM agent_human_review WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_human_review SET status = #{status}, decision_json = #{decisionJson}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
